outputs.title: Agent Outputs
outputs.subtitle: Side-by-side view of each agent's isolated workspace — code and HTML page previews.
outputs.empty: No workspaces yet. Run a fair match in the Arena first.
outputs.selectHint: Compare up to 4 agents at once. You can delete individual or selected outputs.
outputs.pickAgents: Select agents on the left to browse their generated files and pages.
outputs.confirmDelete: Delete this agent output? This cannot be undone.
outputs.confirmDeleteSelected: Delete {n} selected agent outputs? This cannot be undone.
outputs.confirmDeleteBatch: Delete all outputs in this batch? This cannot be undone.

hero.title: LLM Arena
hero.subtitle: Fair & transparent benchmarking for coding agents
hero.description: Compare LLM coding capabilities in controlled environments. Same tasks, same tools, same constraints — only the model changes.

features.title: Why
features.subtitle: Built for rigorous, reproducible evaluation of coding agents

controlledEnv.title: Controlled Environment
controlledEnv.description: Each model runs in identical containers with fixed OpenCode version, agent config, and system prompts.

fairComparison.title: Fair Comparison
fairComparison.description: Single variable principle ensures only the model and API config differ between runs.

comprehensive.title: Comprehensive Metrics
comprehensive.description: Track pass rates, code quality, token usage, execution time, and safety scores.

models.title: Supported
models.subtitle: Currently benchmarking these leading LLM coding agents

modelConfig.title: Model Configuration
modelConfig.subtitle: Manage and configure LLM models for the arena
modelConfig.apiKeyOptional: optional - uses env var if empty
modelConfig.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this model?
modelConfig.envSyncHint: Two-way sync with server .env: pull / push API keys.
modelConfig.savedAndEnv: Saved in browser and synced to .env
modelConfig.savedLocalOnly: Saved in browser only (.env sync failed — is the API up?)

cta.title: Ready to
cta.subtitle: Start your first arena run and see how different models perform on real coding tasks.

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.subtitle: Compare models by eval track (tools & constraints frozen within a track)
leaderboard.byTrackHint: Scores are only comparable within the same track (single-variable principle).

tracks.label: Eval track
tracks.empty: No tasks in this track yet

arena.title: Arena
arena.subtitle: Fair multi-model comparison under frozen constraints (single-variable principle)
arena.selectModelsHint: Pick at least 2 models. Temperature, steps, and system prompt are frozen; only model + API credentials differ.
arena.trackHint: Tracks partition the task pool only; within a track, tools and frozen knobs are identical — only model/API differ.
arena.singleVariableHint: Same track, task, tools, system prompt, and decoding knobs; only model and API key/base URL change.
arena.noRuns: No runs yet. Select at least 2 models and a task to start.
arena.terminalEmpty: After a match, each agent's OpenCode terminal dialogue appears here side-by-side
arena.terminalEmptyHint: Pick ≥2 models + a task, start a fair match. You'll see thinking, tool calls, and observations.
arena.noHtml: No HTML page (check log/steps for non-UI tasks)
arena.noSteps: No step transcript (container path may omit steps)
arena.stubWarning: Looks like a scaffold page — re-run or inspect the OpenCode log.
arena.opencodeToolsHint: Every contestant gets the same frozen official tool set
